title: Korean-Style Flaxseed Pancakes
description: Crispy on the outside and fluffy on the inside, these pancakes are a delicious twist on traditional Korean-style pancakes. Made with nutritious flaxseed, they're perfect for a quick breakfast or snack.

ingredients.name: Vegan Egg Replacer
ingredients.notes: such as flaxseed or chia seeds

instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together ground flaxseed, Korean chopped greens, Korean chili flakes, vegan egg replacer, and water.
Let the mixture sit for 5 minutes to thicken.
Heat a non-stick pan or griddle over medium heat.
Add sesame oil to the pan and swirl it around.
Using a 1/4 cup measuring cup, scoop the flaxseed mixture into the pan.
Cook the pancakes for 2-3 minutes on the first side, or until bubbles appear on the surface.
Flip the pancakes and cook for an additional 1-2 minutes.
Serve the pancakes hot with soy sauce and coconut sugar.
Optional: garnish with additional Korean chopped greens and sesame seeds.
